speaker: rep
text: Hi, thanks for taking the time to chat today. I'd love to learn more about your current setup.

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, happy to chat. We've been looking at a few options.

speaker: rep
text: Great! What's driving the evaluation right now?

speaker: prospect
text: Honestly, our current tool is just too slow. Our team spends more time fighting the software than selling.

speaker: rep
text: That's a pain point we hear a lot. How many reps are on your team?

speaker: rep
text: Got it. And what does your typical outbound workflow look like?

speaker: prospect
text: We do a mix of cold calls and email sequences. Mostly phone though.

speaker: rep
text: Makes sense. When you say the tool is slow, can you give me a specific example?

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, logging a call takes like 3 minutes. By then the rep has forgotten half the details.

speaker: rep
text: That's brutal. So you're losing call intelligence because of the friction?

speaker: prospect
text: Exactly. And our managers can't coach effectively because the notes are incomplete.

speaker: rep
text: What would it look like if that problem was solved?

speaker: prospect
text: Honestly, if calls were auto-logged and our managers could review them, that alone would be huge.

speaker: rep
text: We actually do exactly that. Would it make sense to show you a quick demo?

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, let's do it. Can we schedule something for next week?
